nasb.text: Then he set the stands, five on the right side of the house and five on the left side of the house; and he set the sea of cast metal on the right side of the house eastward toward the south.

esv.text: And he set the stands, five on the south side of the house, and five on the north side of the house. And he set the sea at the southeast corner of the house.

cnv.text: 他把五個盆座放在殿的南邊，五個放在殿的北邊，又把銅海放在殿的南邊，就是靠東南角的地方。

ccb.text: 殿门左右各放五个盆座。铜海放在殿的东南角。
